void pnf_handle_rssi_indication(pnf_t* pnf, void *pRecvMsg, int recvMsgLen)
{
	if (pRecvMsg == NULL || pnf == NULL)
	{
		NFAPI_TRACE(NFAPI_TRACE_ERROR, "%s: NULL parameters\n", __FUNCTION__);
	}
	else
	{
		nfapi_rssi_indication_t ind;

		NFAPI_TRACE(NFAPI_TRACE_INFO, "RSSI.indication received\n");

		nfapi_pnf_config_t* config = &(pnf->_public);

		// unpack the message
		if (nfapi_p4_message_unpack(pRecvMsg, recvMsgLen, &ind, sizeof(ind), &config->codec_config) >= 0)
		{
			if(config->state == NFAPI_PNF_RUNNING)
			{
				nfapi_pnf_phy_config_t* phy = nfapi_pnf_phy_config_find(config, ind.header.phy_id);
				if(phy)
				{
					if(phy->state == NFAPI_PNF_PHY_RUNNING)
					{
						if(config->rssi_ind)
						{
							(config->rssi_ind)(config, phy, &ind);
						}
					}
					else
					{
						NFAPI_TRACE(NFAPI_TRACE_ERROR, "%s: PHY not in RUNNING state\n", __FUNCTION__);
					}
				}
				else
				{
					NFAPI_TRACE(NFAPI_TRACE_ERROR, "%s: PHY not found\n", __FUNCTION__);
				}
			}
			else
			{
				NFAPI_TRACE(NFAPI_TRACE_ERROR, "%s: PNF not in RUNNING state\n", __FUNCTION__);
			}
		}
		else
		{
			NFAPI_TRACE(NFAPI_TRACE_ERROR, "%s: Unpack message failed, ignoring\n", __FUNCTION__);
		}

		if(ind.vendor_extension)
			pnf->_public.codec_config.deallocate(ind.vendor_extension);

	}
}
